headline: Adobe WPP AI Alliance Tests Moat In Enterprise Marketing Workflows
summary: Adobe and WPP have expanded their global partnership to combine Adobe's AI tools with WPP's agentic marketing platform. The collaboration focuses on integrated marketing solutions that connect AI, content platforms, and data orchestration, with an emphasis on privacy and brand consistency. Adobe, traded as NasdaqGS:ADBE, is rolling out this partnership while its share price stands at $260.72. The stock has had a mixed run, with a 5.7% gain over the past week but declines of 11.1% over 30...
